title: Piersprawl
description: Adds a village on the ocean
body:
A village that spawns on the ocean while keeping to the vanilla side of the game.

## Current structures.

### Houses:
- 3x small houses
- 1x double house

### Professions:
- Navigator (librarian and cartographer)
- Dockyard
- Lightkeeper
- Forge
- Shepard
- Cleric

### Misc:
- Carrot, Potato, and Wheat Farms
- Recreation Space
- Animal Pen

## Management
### Spawn:
/place structure piersprawl:ocean_village

### Locate:
/locate structure piersprawl:ocean_village

### Biomes for natural spawning:
- lukewarm_ocean
- warm_ocean
- cold_ocean

### Note: This should work in the fabric loader considering I built this pack using it. 



This is something I always wanted to see in the game. I have seen some amazing village packs out there but I also wanted to try and make one myself! 

Might split professions into proper buildings instead of pairing them together.
